name: Sicilian Skillet Chicken (Wgjt73a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the chicken slightly.
2. Coat each piece with 6 tablespoons of grated Parmesan cheese and then flour. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. In a large skillet, cook the chicken in oil over medium-high heat until it is cooked through. Remove the chicken to a serving dish and keep warm.
4. In the same skillet, cook the mushrooms, onion, and rosemary until soft.
5. Add the tomatoes and cook, uncovered, over medium-high heat until thickened.
6. Spoon the sauce over the chicken and top with the remaining Parmesan cheese.
7. Serve over pasta. Tastes great and is quick to fix. Prep time: 5 minutes. Cook time: 25 minutes. From Del Monte.
